sentences.target: On remplit le seau au robinet.

translations.fr: On remplit le seau au robinet.
translations.en: We fill the bucket at the tap.
translations.es: Llenamos el cubo bajo el grifo.
translations.de: Wir füllen den Eimer am Wasserhahn.
translations.it: Riempiamo il secchio sotto il rubinetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在水龙头下把桶装满。
translations.yue: 我哋喺水龍頭下裝滿個桶。
translations.pt: Enchemos o balde debaixo da torneira.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hứng đầy xô dưới vòi nước.
translations.nl: We vullen de emmer bij de kraan.
translations.hi: हम नल के नीचे बाल्टी भरते हैं.
translations.el: Γεμίζουμε τον κουβά κάτω από τη βρύση.
translations.id: Kami mengisi ember di bawah keran.
translations.ja: 蛇口の下でバケツに水を入れます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun, often meaning ‘we’ in spoken French.
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’.
Definite article, masculine singular, marking a specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘remplit’.
Contraction of ‘à’ + ‘le’; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.

sentences.target: Tu prends un seau pour laver le sol.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ œ̃ so puʁ lave lə sɔl/

translations.fr: Tu prends un seau pour laver le sol.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ œ̃ so puʁ lave lə sɔl/
translations.en: You take a bucket to clean the floor.
translations.es: Coges un cubo para limpiar el suelo.
translations.de: Du nimmst einen Eimer, um den Boden zu putzen.
translations.it: Prendi un secchio per pulire il pavimento.
translations.ru: Ты берёшь ведро, чтобы помыть пол.
translations.pt: Você pega um balde para limpar o chão.
translations.he: אתה לוקח דלי כדי לנקות את הרצפה.
translations.tr: Yeri temizlemek için bir kova alıyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn lấy một xô để lau sàn.
translations.nl: Je pakt een emmer om de vloer schoon te maken.
translations.uk: Ти береш відро, щоб помити підлогу.
translations.hu: Fogsz egy vödröt, hogy felmosd a padlót.
translations.hi: तुम फर्श साफ करने के लिए एक बाल्टी लेते हो.
translations.el: Παίρνεις έναν κουβά για να καθαρίσεις το πάτωμα.
translations.nb: Du tar en bøtte for å vaske gulvet.
translations.id: Kamu mengambil ember untuk membersihkan lantai.
translations.sv: Du tar en hink för att tvätta golvet.
translations.ro: Iei o găleată ca să cureți podeaua.
translations.cs: Bereš si kbelík, abys umyl podlahu.
translations.da: Du tager en spand for at gøre gulvet rent.
translations.ja: 床を掃除するためにバケツを持っていく。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun (informal).
Verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with ‘Tu’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘prends’.
Preposition expressing purpose or intention.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of ‘pour’ (purpose).
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the infinitive ‘laver’.

translations.en: I'm bringing my bucket of sand.
translations.de: Ich bringe meinen Eimer mit Sand.
translations.it: Porto il mio secchio di sabbia.
translations.ru: Я несу своё ведёрко с песком.
translations.pt: Estou levando meu balde de areia.
translations.he: אני מביא את דלי החול שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi mang theo xô cát của mình.
translations.nl: Ik breng mijn emmer met zand.
translations.uk: Я несу своє відерце з піском.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी रेत की बाल्टी ला रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Φέρνω τον κουβά μου με άμμο.
translations.sv: Jag tar med min hink med sand.
translations.ja: 砂の入った自分のバケツを持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ elided before vowel-initial verb; first person singular subject.
Verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with ‘J’’.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; masculine singular agreeing with ‘seau’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘apporte’ and head of the noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a noun complement indicating content/material.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of ‘seau’ introduced by ‘de’.

sentences.target: Nous achetons un seau au magasin.

translations.fr: Nous achetons un seau au magasin.
translations.en: We're buying a bucket at the store.
translations.es: Compramos un cubo en la tienda.
translations.de: Wir kaufen einen Eimer im Laden.
translations.pt: Nós compramos um balde na loja.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mua một cái xô ở cửa hàng.
translations.nl: We kopen een emmer in de winkel.
translations.hi: हम दुकान से एक बाल्टी खरीदते हैं.
translations.el: Αγοράζουμε έναν κουβά από το κατάστημα.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper en bøtte i butikken.
translations.id: Kami membeli sebuah ember di toko.
translations.sv: Vi köper en hink i affären.
translations.ro: Cumpărăm o găleată de la magazin.
translations.da: Vi køber en spand i butikken.
translations.ja: 私たちは店でバケツを買います。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural subject pronoun.
Verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; agrees with ‘Nous’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘achetons’.
Contraction of ‘à’ + ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.
